title: Should I Buy NVDA? — Single-Stock Decision
description: A faithful lift of the 'us-stock-analysis' Comprehensive Investment Report workflow (tradermonty/claude-trading-skills, MIT), composed with sibling skills from the same repo for the lanes that single workflow defers to: market-environment-analysis + sector-analyst (macro/industry), market-news-analyst (news/catalysts), scenario-analyzer (bull/bear synthesis), position-sizer (Kelly + ATR sizing), and exposure-coach (risk controls). Four ingest lanes run in parallel and fan into a synthesized thesis; sizing and risk controls chain off it; the final report fans in from the decision. Arrows are the knowledge: each lane is an independent read, and a 200-word 'should I buy' answer compresses these into one — this trace pulls them back apart.

account_size.description: Total account equity, used by position sizing and risk controls

ingest_price.name: Ingest Price & Volume
ingest_price.does: Pull OHLCV history, 52-week range, average volume, and the standard indicator stack (MA/RSI/MACD/Bollinger/ATR). Writes both a JSON summary and the full indicator series.

ingest_fundamentals.name: Ingest Fundamentals
ingest_fundamentals.does: Pull financial statements snapshot, key metrics (P/E, EPS, margins, growth), and analyst ratings / price targets.

ingest_macro.name: Ingest Market Environment
ingest_macro.does: Assess the macro backdrop: risk-on/risk-off, VIX, rates, and where capital is rotating.

ingest_news.name: Ingest News & Calendar
ingest_news.does: Gather recent company news, the earnings calendar, and developing storylines around the name.

valuation.name: Valuation
valuation.does: Compute valuation ratios (P/E, fwd P/E, PEG, P/B, EV/EBITDA), compare vs history and peers, and estimate a fair-value range + target price.

business_quality.name: Business Quality
business_quality.does: Assess moat, margin structure, growth durability, and competitive position from the fundamentals.

technical_read.name: Technical Read
technical_read.does: Read trend, moving-average posture, support/resistance, RSI/MACD/Bollinger, and chart patterns into a technical outlook.

entry_levels.name: Entry & Stop Levels
entry_levels.does: Set an entry zone and an ATR-based stop distance off the technical read, with reward:risk per level.

industry_health.name: Industry Health
industry_health.does: Judge the semiconductor / AI-compute cycle, end-demand, and NVDA's share position from the macro read.

catalysts_risks.name: Catalysts & Risks
catalysts_risks.does: Turn the news/calendar into dated near-term catalysts and risk flags with direction and timing.

synthesize_thesis.name: Synthesize Thesis
synthesize_thesis.does: Fan in the lanes into bull and bear cases, key assumptions, a risk/reward read, and a Buy/Hold/Sell rating with conviction.

position_sizing.name: Position Sizing
position_sizing.does: Size the position from the thesis conviction and entry/stop: fixed-fractional, ATR-based, and half-Kelly, then pick a final share count under portfolio constraints.

risk_controls.name: Risk Controls & Monitoring
risk_controls.does: Set the stop-loss plan, portfolio heat / exposure ceiling, and the monitoring triggers that would change the call.

investment_report.name: Investment Report
investment_report.does: Compose the full Buy/Hold/Sell report (exec summary, thesis, fundamentals, technicals, valuation, risk, catalysts, recommendation) per the us-stock-analysis report template.

build_charts.name: Build Charts
build_charts.does: Render the price/MA/Bollinger (with entry/stop/resistance), RSI, MACD, and drawdown charts from the real indicator series. Deterministic — run scripts/make_charts.py.

typeset_report.name: Typeset PDF
typeset_report.does: Render report.md + charts into a fixed-format equity-research PDF. The house style is enforced in code (scripts/typeset.py), so every run produces an identically-formatted note.

deliverable.description: A Buy/Hold/Sell decision on the ticker, delivered as a fixed-format equity-research PDF (report.pdf), with the underlying markdown report, synthesized thesis, and concrete position-sizing + risk-control plan that make it actionable.
